profile.belief: Making what authorities ignore impossible to unsee anymore. That's the whole force.
profile.working_on: Editing a 60-minute documentary capturing street musicians fighting ordinances written to make their survival illegal.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
